Name: update_departments_by_pk
SQL: WITH mutation_result AS (UPDATE "public"."departments" SET "description" = $1::text, "budget" = "budget" + $2::numeric WHERE departments."id" = $3::uuid RETURNING *) SELECT row_to_json((SELECT "_e" FROM (SELECT mutation_result."id" AS "id", mutation_result."name" AS "name", mutation_result."description" AS "description", mutation_result."budget" AS "budget") AS "_e")) FROM mutation_result
